title: SIEMENS EQ6 plus S300, Fully Automatic Bean to Cup Espresso Coffee Machine with Cappuccinatore milk system, 11 beverages, Ceramic Grinder, Large Touchscreen Display, TE653M11GB, Titanium
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: SIMPLE ONE-TOUCH BREWING: Select your favourite coffee or milk-based beverage using the large touchscreen display
AUTOMATIC CLEANING OF THE MILK SYSTEM: The milk system steam-cleans itself automatically after each milk-based drink for impeccable hygiene
TWO COFFEES AT ONCE: Simultaneously prepare two strong espressos, tasty coffees, or mild Americanos for double the enjoyment
SAVE YOUR PERSONALISED BEVERAGES: Use the Favourites feature to save your customised coffee and milk beverages for easy one-touch access

CUSTOM DRINK OPTIONS : Select from 11 beverages using the touchscreen interface, choose your favourite drinks — from espressos to lattes — and quickly customise flavour, strength, and milk type with convenient preset options
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Full-colour and intuitive - coffeeSelect Display View all coffee options at a glance and select your preference at a single touch. Auto-cleaning of the milk system - autoMilk Clean. A fully automatic steam cleaning process after every drink with milk or manual cleaning. Previous page Unique for perfect taste - the iAroma System. Manages the interplay between the ceramic grinder, heater, waterpump and high-tech brewing unit. Finely ground beans - ceramic grinder. The ceramic grinder ensures an ideal grinding degree for perfect coffee aroma. Ideal brewing temperature - intelligent heater. Sensors ensure an ideal temperature of 90-95°C to get the full flavour out of every bean. Adjusts amount and speed- smart water pump Perfect coffee aroma requires the optimum water pressure - supplied by the waterpump. Combines everything perfectly - high-tech brewing. Full coffee aroma thanks to the optimum temperature, right amount of water and freshly ground blends Next page 1 iAroma System 2 Ceramic grinder 3 Intelligent heater 4 Smart water pump 5 High-tech brewing Siemens EQ6 TE653M11GB Explore our range NO Connectivity YES: Home Connect One touch, two cups Cappuccinatore Milk Solution Cappuccinatore NO Touch Screen display 5" iSelect Display 2 No of favourites 10 Cup Warmer 10 No of programmes 18 (+ 30 via app) NO Connectivity YES: Home Connect One touch, two cups Cappuccinatore Milk Solution Integrated NO Touch Screen display 5" iSelect Display 2 No of favourites 15 Cup Warmer 10 No of programmes 18 (+ 30 via app) NO Connectivity YES: Home Connect One touch, two cups Cappuccinatore Milk Solution Integrated NO Touch Screen display 5" iSelect Display 2 No of favourites 30 Cup Warmer 10 No of programmes 23 (+ 30 via app) NO Connectivity YES: Home Connect One touch, two cups Cappuccinatore Milk Solution Integrated NO Touch Screen display 6.8” iSelect Display 2 No of favourites 10 Cup Warmer 10 No of programmes 20 (+ 30 via app) Previous page Siemens EQ700 TP705GB1 Learn More Siemens EQ700 TQ703GB7 Learn More Siemens EQ700 TQ707GB3 Learn More Siemens EQ900 TQ905GB3 Learn More Next page Previous page 100% perfect fi t – Original Siemens Accessories. Long-lasting service life and coffee enjoyment. The Original Siemens accessories are designed especially for use with your appliance (Siemens EQ.3, EQ.500, EQ.6 plus, EQ.9 plus). More info Best care through smart limescale removal. Siemens descaling tablets contain three different acids that perfectly suit your machine. Its specifically developed 2 in1 formula eliminates impurities and protects the components from corrosion. More info Perfect aroma and optimal cleaning. Siemens cleaning tablets extend your machine’s lifespan thanks to the 2in1 formula. The powerful EQ.Series cleaning tablets ensures the best aroma and removes coffee oil residues fast and reliably. More info Longer enjoyment and best aroma. The BRITA INTENZA filters your tap water and protects your coffee machine from limescale build-up. The Original INTENZA Aroma Ring lets you customize tap water depending on the local water hardness More info Long-lasting service life and coffee enjoyment. The EQ.series espresso care set contains cleaning tablets to remove coffee oil residues; descaling tablets to remove limescale and the BRITA INTENZA filter to reduce water hardness. More info Next page
